title: Oslo

jokes.text: Selina Meyer! The woman who freed Tibet!
jokes.setup: Grandiose introduction at what appears to be a Nobel event
jokes.punchline: The irony that Selina will later offer to give Tibet back to China
jokes.explanation: Sets up the central irony of the episode - Selina being celebrated for freeing Tibet while planning to give it back for political gain

jokes.text: It's kinda like the Peace Prize Junior.
jokes.setup: Selina's excitement about winning what she thinks is the Nobel Peace Prize
jokes.punchline: Deflating revelation that it's a lesser award described in childish terms
jokes.explanation: Perfect deflation of pretension with childish language - 'Junior' is beautifully dismissive

jokes.text: I wanna sound like Bono trying to impress his own reflection in the mirror.
jokes.setup: Giving instructions for how pretentious the speech should be
jokes.punchline: Specific, absurd image of ultimate narcissistic pretension
jokes.explanation: Brilliant specific imagery that perfectly captures both Bono's pretension and Selina's self-awareness about her own performative nobility

jokes.text: The Nobel people don't ask too many questions if you buy a table. Ma'am, at this point, they're just trying to avoid losing the building.
jokes.setup: Question about war criminals at the Nobel event
jokes.punchline: Revelation that the Nobel organization is financially desperate
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy about institutional corruption with perfect escalation from moral compromise to financial desperation

jokes.text: I think it's pronounced 'half-white.' Well, 'tomato, mulatto.'
jokes.setup: Selina calling her opponent a 'half-wit'
jokes.punchline: Mike's correction leading to Selina's horrifically casual racist pun
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Selina's casual racism and quick wit in a horrifying but character-perfect moment

jokes.text: mini-vegan pigs in gluten-free blankets
jokes.setup: Normal wedding catering discussion
jokes.punchline: Absurd vegan version of 'pigs in blankets' that makes no sense
jokes.explanation: Absurdist food contradiction that captures liberal pretension perfectly

jokes.text: Because without an American marriage license, U.S. community property laws do not apply, my darling.
jokes.setup: Suggesting Catherine get married in Europe
jokes.punchline: Revealing the real reason is to avoid property sharing with Marjorie
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment - disguising selfish legal maneuvering as motherly advice

jokes.text: That's fine. You and your maid of honor here can sit me next to whatever Injun Joe you want.
jokes.setup: Wedding seating arrangements discussion
jokes.punchline: Selina's casual racism toward the shaman and dismissal of Marjorie
jokes.explanation: Character-consistent casual bigotry that shows Selina's complete disregard for others' feelings

jokes.text: Face to face, I can convince anyone of anything. - That's not true. - Incorrect. You're both wrong. - Both: You're right.
jokes.setup: Selina's confident claim about her persuasive abilities
jokes.punchline: Staff immediately contradicting her, then immediately agreeing when she pushes back
jokes.explanation: Perfect rapid-fire contradiction sequence that shows both Selina's delusion and her staff's fear of her

jokes.text: Lu developed a real hankering for Finnish furburger back at Camp David. He eye-fucked her so bad he got retinal herpes.
jokes.setup: Explanation of using Minna as bait for President Lu
jokes.punchline: Grossly sexual description escalating to absurd medical consequence
jokes.explanation: Vulgar escalation from crude sexual reference to impossible medical consequence - pure Veep style

jokes.text: - I don't get the attraction. - Oh, I do.
jokes.setup: Selina's confusion about Lu's attraction to Minna
jokes.punchline: Gary's immediate understanding, implying his own attraction
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and character moment - Gary's sexual preferences revealed in two words

jokes.text: Maybe you should let 'em choke you. You think they would rather choke me than listen to me talk? I can only speak for myself.
jokes.setup: Minna's complaint about lovers finding her dirty talk boring
jokes.punchline: Selina's suggestion escalating to her admitting she'd prefer choking Minna
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark escalation where Selina reveals her true feelings through supposedly helpful advice

jokes.text: Oh, my gosh, I didn't know you were still alive.
jokes.setup: Meeting with Georgian President Murman
jokes.punchline: Selina's brutally honest surprise that he's survived
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment - saying exactly what everyone's thinking with no filter

jokes.text: The Russians reinstalled me when they invaded Georgia. Ha! - Oh, good for you. - Factory reboot. Both: Beep-boop-beep-beep-boop.
jokes.setup: Murman explaining his return to power
jokes.punchline: Robot sound effects treating his Russian puppet status as a tech reboot
jokes.explanation: Brilliant metaphor for political puppet status using tech language, with both characters joining in

jokes.text: Leeds United. No English players, so pretty good team.
jokes.setup: Murman mentioning buying an English football club
jokes.punchline: Casual xenophobic dig at English football players
jokes.explanation: Casual xenophobia delivered as sports commentary - perfectly captures character's casual bigotry

jokes.text: America does not stand for foreign interference in our elections! Who do you think that I am? - Yes, of course. Of course. - It's an outrage! - New topic. New topic.
jokes.setup: Murman offering to help Selina's election with money
jokes.punchline: Selina's performative outrage immediately followed by topic change to real estate
jokes.explanation: Perfect political hypocrisy - moral outrage immediately abandoned when money laundering is reframed as real estate

jokes.text: I'd rather deal with the Russian mob than with those real estate people. It's because they're unethical, that's what they are.
jokes.setup: Discussion of real estate transaction
jokes.punchline: Claiming real estate agents are more unethical than the Russian mob
jokes.explanation: Absurd moral relativism where Russian mob is preferable to real estate agents due to commission structure

jokes.text: Or else we'll tell the whole world how you vaporized a DRA leader's wedding with Hellfire missiles and also took a huge laser-guided shit all over Pakistani sovereignty
jokes.setup: Threatening to expose classified military operation
jokes.punchline: Mixing serious war crime language with crude scatological metaphor
jokes.explanation: Brilliant juxtaposition of military jargon with toilet humor - 'laser-guided shit' is perfectly absurd

jokes.text: It was classified-- until somebody on your staff clicked on 'Asian Girls Bound and Gagged.'
jokes.setup: Question about how classified footage was obtained
jokes.punchline: Revelation that it was leaked through porn site malware
jokes.explanation: Brilliant modern twist on political scandal - classified info leaked through porn malware rather than whistleblowing

jokes.text: Oh, Ben. Or Kent. Or Leon. Oh, God. Or Marjorie.
jokes.setup: Trying to figure out which staffer clicked the porn link
jokes.punchline: List escalating to include Catherine's fiancée as a possibility
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation ending with the absurdity of suspecting her daughter's lesbian fiancée

jokes.text: Hey, Siri, you fuck my dad? Siri: I don't know how to respond to that. Typical woman.
jokes.setup: Jonah trying to avoid his father's calls
jokes.punchline: Asking Siri an inappropriate question then making sexist comment about her response
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah moment - inappropriate technology interaction followed by casual misogyny

jokes.text: The guests are vegan, and the president won't eat anything without a face.
jokes.setup: Describing wedding catering challenges
jokes.punchline: Impossible dietary contradiction between vegan guests and carnivorous president
jokes.explanation: Brilliant economy describing Selina's carnivorous preferences in the most disturbing way possible

jokes.text: So I droned a couple wedding civilians on the wrong side of the Af-Pak border.
jokes.setup: Selina explaining the wedding situation
jokes.punchline: Casual admission to war crimes with bureaucratic language
jokes.explanation: Perfect dark comedy - war crimes described as minor bureaucratic mix-up with casual tone

jokes.text: 'dr-droned a wedding' is, uh, American slang for, uh... 'I got it, I nailed it.'
jokes.setup: Trying to cover up war crime admission
jokes.punchline: Attempting to pass off 'droned' as positive slang
jokes.explanation: Brilliant cringe comedy as Selina desperately tries to reframe drone strikes as positive slang

jokes.text: No, no, no. Really. Like, 'I droned that wedding, man!' I do not think that it is slang of any kind.
jokes.setup: Selina doubling down on fake slang explanation
jokes.punchline: Minna's flat rejection while Selina uses increasingly inappropriate examples
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation of cringe as Selina makes her lie worse while Minna maintains deadpan disbelief

jokes.text: Do they give Nobel Peace Prizes to war criminals, Minna? All the time. Aung San Suu Kyi, Henry Kissinger
jokes.setup: Selina's defensive question about war criminals winning Peace Prizes
jokes.punchline: Minna's matter-of-fact listing of controversial Nobel winners
jokes.explanation: Sharp political satire about the Nobel Committee's history with an educational element

jokes.text: I called Interpol before we got in the car.
jokes.setup: Selina assuming she can manipulate Minna
jokes.punchline: Revelation that Minna was already several steps ahead
jokes.explanation: Perfect reversal where the seemingly naive character outsmarts the manipulator

jokes.text: Sweet Viking Christ! Come on!
jokes.setup: Selina chasing after Minna in Norway
jokes.punchline: Culturally-specific religious exclamation fitting the Nordic setting
jokes.explanation: Good character-appropriate curse that shows Selina adapting her profanity to the cultural context

jokes.text: As the former president of the United States, truth and justice can gargle my balls.
jokes.setup: Minna's appeal to principles of truth and justice
jokes.punchline: Selina's vulgar dismissal using presidential authority
jokes.explanation: Peak Selina - using presidential gravitas to deliver the most undignified possible response

jokes.text: That's because Autistic Barbie here tattled on me over the wedding drone strike.
jokes.setup: Explaining why ICC has issued warrant
jokes.punchline: Cruel nickname for Minna combining disability slur with toy reference
jokes.explanation: Character-consistent cruelty but relies on disability slur for shock value

jokes.text: I'd just as soon stay at an Embassy Suites.
jokes.setup: Offer of asylum at Finnish embassy
jokes.punchline: Preferring hotel chain with similar name
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay showing Selina's materialistic priorities even in crisis

jokes.text: She prefers the word 'spa.'
jokes.setup: Discussion of asylum situation
jokes.punchline: Reframing embassy as luxury accommodation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ben deadpan - treating diplomatic crisis as customer service issue

jokes.text: This is where you stick an unfuckable intern.
jokes.setup: Richard seeing his new Lieutenant Governor office
jokes.punchline: Innocent Richard using crude language inappropriately
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Richard's innocent vulgarity shows he's learning political speak

jokes.text: Last night I tried to find one non-chain restaurant to eat at, and Yelp basically told me to go Fuddrucker myself.
jokes.setup: Complaining about Iowa dining options
jokes.punchline: Restaurant chain name used as euphemistic curse
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay turning restaurant name into curse while making point about chain restaurant dominance

jokes.text: Save it, Manhattan Date Rape Mystery.
jokes.setup: Dan trying to speak diplomatically
jokes.punchline: Governor's harsh assessment of Dan's character type
jokes.explanation: Brutally specific character assassination that perfectly captures Dan's sleazy persona

jokes.text: Although publically, Montez claims to be considering all options. Privately, I heard she's been doing impressions of you getting broom-sticked in prison.
jokes.setup: White House response to Selina's situation
jokes.punchline: Revelation of Montez privately mocking Selina's potential prison assault
jokes.explanation: Dark political comedy showing how political rivals celebrate each other's misfortune

jokes.text: Are people actually laughing at that impression? - No. - Yes.
jokes.setup: Selina asking about Montez's impression quality
jokes.punchline: Contradictory answers revealing staff's different priorities
jokes.explanation: Quick character beat showing Ben's protective instinct vs Kent's brutal honesty

jokes.text: Well, no offense, Ben, but honestly, that could be, like, tonight. - God willing.
jokes.setup: Selina saying Ben could die before she gets out
jokes.punchline: Ben's enthusiastic agreement with his own death
jokes.explanation: Perfect dark character moment - Ben's death wish delivered with enthusiasm

jokes.text: Ambassador Costas was Montez's husband's chiropractor.
jokes.setup: Discussing getting help from the American Ambassador to Norway
jokes.punchline: Revealing the ambassador's only qualification is treating the president's husband's back
jokes.explanation: Good satire of political appointment nepotism - ambassador job going to medical service provider

jokes.text: From the bottom of my heart, I truly and completely forgive you. Now shut the living fuck up.
jokes.setup: Selina offering seemingly heartfelt forgiveness
jokes.punchline: Immediate vulgar contradiction revealing true feelings
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina hypocrisy - fake grace immediately undercut by genuine hostility

jokes.text: Streptococksucker.
jokes.setup: Amy seeing someone with chicken pox symptoms
jokes.punchline: Combining medical terminology with profanity
jokes.explanation: Good Amy line combining her medical knowledge with characteristic profanity

jokes.text: You infected all those nutballs who don't believe in vaccinations! Well, serves 'em right.
jokes.setup: Amy pointing out Jonah caused chicken pox outbreak
jokes.punchline: Jonah showing no remorse for his anti-vax supporters getting sick
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic justice - anti-vax politician showing no sympathy for vaccine-preventable illness

jokes.text: Were you too busy bed-wetting and cutting fuck-holes in watermelons? Amy, that only works with fleshy melons. And sometimes pumpkins.
jokes.setup: Amy's crude insult about Jonah's childhood
jokes.punchline: Jonah and Beth's technical corrections about fruit penetration
jokes.explanation: Absurdist escalation where characters provide technical expertise on bizarre sexual practices

jokes.text: Were you too busy bed-wetting and cutting fuck-holes in watermelons?
jokes.setup: Asking if Jonah had chicken pox as a child
jokes.punchline: Escalating list of pathetic childhood activities
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Amy's verbal cruelty, though relies on shock value

jokes.text: I hate you so much I could walk into a supermarket and shoot everybody.
jokes.setup: Father-son reconciliation attempt
jokes.punchline: Jonah's extreme violent response to paternal feelings
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation that captures Jonah's disproportionate rage and potential for violence

jokes.text: I hate you so much I could walk into a supermarket and shoot everybody.
jokes.setup: Jonah expressing anger at his father
jokes.punchline: Escalating to mass violence hyperbole
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's unhinged nature but relies on mass shooting reference without much craft

jokes.text: OK, you can be my dad. I can be what? You can be my dad if you want. I love you too, Daddy. No homo.
jokes.setup: Father trying to reconcile with son
jokes.punchline: Jonah's bizarre acceptance followed by 'no homo' qualifier
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Jonah's emotional immaturity and casual homophobia in tender moment

jokes.text: Amerikkalainen war criminal syo kaikki.
jokes.setup: Someone asking who ate the yogurt
jokes.punchline: Minna calling Selina 'American war criminal ate everything' in Finnish
jokes.explanation: Clever multilingual insult that maintains Minna's moral stance while being petty about yogurt

jokes.text: I feel like the Grim Reaper just dropped his scythe and started eating me out!
jokes.setup: Selina's excitement about improved polling numbers
jokes.punchline: Bizarre sexual metaphor involving death personification
jokes.explanation: Absolutely bonkers metaphor that perfectly captures Selina's crude eloquence and political resurrection

jokes.text: Ma'am, we got bigger reindeer to fuck here.
jokes.setup: Discussion of priorities during crisis
jokes.punchline: Scandinavian-appropriate version of 'bigger fish to fry'
jokes.explanation: Clever localization of common idiom to Norwegian setting with characteristic Ben vulgarity

jokes.text: Yes. Yeah, I believe it is. Apparently, Al Bashir had some sort of a private zoo, and that's actually how we were able to locate him. And boom! Wow! There goes the elephant.
jokes.setup: Describing drone footage on live television
jokes.punchline: Casual discussion of elephant death during war crime explanation
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy of treating elephant death as casual collateral damage in live TV war crime discussion

jokes.text: Yes. Yeah, I believe it is. Apparently, Al Bashir had some sort of a private zoo, and that's actually how we were able to locate him.
jokes.setup: Being asked about elephant in drone footage
jokes.punchline: Casually explaining how they tracked terrorist through his exotic animal collection
jokes.explanation: Good dark humor about intelligence methods and the absurdity of dictators' hobbies

jokes.text: but if anyone's crawling out of our cesspool of a state to become his Ag Sec, it's gonna be this pigfucker.
jokes.setup: Discussing Richard's potential future in a Jonah administration
jokes.punchline: Combining insults about Iowa with crude sexual reference
jokes.explanation: Shows the governor's crude nature and self-loathing about Iowa, but relies on shock value

jokes.text: but if anyone's crawling out of our cesspool of a state to become his Ag Sec, it's gonna be this pigfucker.
jokes.setup: Discussion of political advancement
jokes.punchline: Calling Iowa a cesspool while planning to benefit from Richard's success
jokes.explanation: Perfect political cynicism - insulting your own state while scheming for personal advancement

jokes.text: They are... the same.
jokes.setup: Selina asking about beige vs Tuscan beige wedding colors
jokes.punchline: Catherine's flat acknowledgment that they're identical
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan response to meaningless color distinction typical of wedding planning

jokes.text: They are... the same. And how is the blushing bride?
jokes.setup: Catherine asking about beige vs Tuscan beige color choices
jokes.punchline: Selina's flat observation followed by sarcastic bride comment
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's dismissiveness of Catherine's wedding planning and her passive-aggressive nature

jokes.text: I didn't know the theme of the wedding was Edward Scissor Sisters.
jokes.setup: Seeing Catherine's wedding appearance
jokes.punchline: Combining Edward Scissorhands with band name to mock lesbian couple
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay insulting daughter's appearance while making lesbian reference

jokes.text: Those sandwiches aren't gonna finger themselves.
jokes.setup: Leaving to attend to wedding preparations
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo in mundane catering task
jokes.explanation: Typical Gary sexual innuendo that fits his character but relies on double entendre

jokes.text: And I'm amazed by your look.
jokes.setup: Seemingly returning Catherine's compliment
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment disguised as reciprocal praise
jokes.explanation: Perfect passive-aggressive mother moment disguised as returning a compliment

jokes.text: And I'm amazed by your look.
jokes.setup: Catherine saying Selina looks amazing
jokes.punchline: Selina's backhanded non-compliment in return
jokes.explanation: Perfect passive-aggressive Selina response - technically reciprocating while being insulting

jokes.text: Fuck me with a side of ranch.
jokes.setup: Jonah's frustration at his situation
jokes.punchline: Bizarre sexual expletive with food service addition
jokes.explanation: Uniquely absurd Jonah expletive that combines sexual frustration with food service terminology

jokes.text: Two generations of scabs, yo!
jokes.setup: Realizing he gave his father chicken pox too
jokes.punchline: Celebrating infecting two generations with inappropriate excitement
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's inappropriate pride in causing harm to family members

jokes.text: No. I feel fucking pretty.
jokes.setup: Marjorie suggesting Catherine clean up for wedding
jokes.punchline: Catherine's defiant profanity about her disheveled appearance
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Catherine channeling her mother's aggression in wedding context

jokes.text: Joint Special Operations Command. JSOC.
jokes.setup: Gary asking who taught Selina to do smoky eye makeup
jokes.punchline: Claiming military special ops taught her makeup techniques
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist escalation connecting military operations to cosmetics with bureaucratic precision

jokes.text: Local citizens banded together in secret to assist the Nazis.
jokes.setup: Murman explaining the tunnel's World War II history
jokes.punchline: Casual revelation about Norwegian Nazi collaboration
jokes.explanation: Dark historical humor delivered with casual tour guide tone

jokes.text: Once, I told my enemy it was tunnel escape, but in fact, I just buried him alive. Actually, it was her, but story is funnier with a man, huh? In these MeToo days, you know?
jokes.setup: Murman telling story about fake tunnel escape
jokes.punchline: Casual murder confession with gender-swapping and meta-commentary
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy mixing murder confession with social commentary and narrative craft awareness

jokes.text: Just kidding. You believed me! You are bad.
jokes.setup: Murman's threat about plane crashing into North Sea
jokes.punchline: Revelation it was a joke followed by playful accusation
jokes.explanation: Classic misdirection joke with Eastern European dictator playfulness

jokes.text: Ma'am, that's the Nobel Prize of bad ideas! - No, that's economics, OK?
jokes.setup: Ben warning against retrieving the Nobel prize
jokes.punchline: Selina's economics burn in response to 'bad ideas' comment
jokes.explanation: Sharp comeback that turns Ben's metaphor into economics joke with perfect timing

jokes.text: Oh, please, I've got America on my side, and America doesn't give a shit about anything!
jokes.setup: Staff warning about international legal consequences
jokes.punchline: Selina's confidence based on American indifference to international law
jokes.explanation: Sharp political satire about American exceptionalism and international law indifference

jokes.text: Tell him to get his dick out of whatever homeless woman froze to death in front of the hotel
jokes.setup: Telling someone to call Leon
jokes.punchline: Escalating crude assumptions about Leon's activities
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's cruelty but relies heavily on shock value with necrophilia and homeless death

jokes.text: Oh, Ames, I almost offered to help your career, then bang you and tell everybody in the office you're an unstable slut.
jokes.setup: Dan meeting Amy at what appears to be a funeral
jokes.punchline: Casual admission of planned workplace sexual harassment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dan moment - casually admitting to pattern of workplace abuse as if it's charming

jokes.text: You barely worked at the White House. Ho ho ho ho!
jokes.setup: Dan introducing himself as former White House worker
jokes.punchline: Amy's immediate contradiction and sarcastic laugh
jokes.explanation: Good Amy-Dan dynamic showing her immediate urge to deflate his self-importance

jokes.text: And we can do genetic testing to make sure they're not born dead.
jokes.setup: Beth explaining family planning with Jonah
jokes.punchline: Completely misunderstanding what genetic testing is for
jokes.explanation: Perfect Beth stupidity - completely missing the point of prenatal testing

jokes.text: Hey, Mom, will you make us some pancakes? Go to the store to make pancakes! Both: Pancakes! Pancakes!
jokes.setup: Family reconciliation at father's deathbed
jokes.punchline: Immediately demanding mother make pancakes and go shopping
jokes.explanation: Absurd family dynamic where death crisis immediately becomes domestic demands

jokes.text: That's for dogs. Uh, that's for dogs.
jokes.setup: Richard suggesting to check if Jonah's father's nose is wet
jokes.punchline: Realizing he's confusing human medical care with pet care
jokes.explanation: Perfect Richard moment - trying to help but applying wrong species' first aid

jokes.text: You can have Tibet. What? Yeah. You can have Tibet back.
jokes.setup: Selina trying to negotiate with President Lu
jokes.punchline: Casually offering to give back Tibet she was celebrated for freeing
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback to opening celebration - Selina immediately trading away her Nobel achievement for political gain

jokes.text: Well, it's barely a democracy, so...
jokes.setup: Lu asking if being president in a democracy is even that great
jokes.punchline: Selina's casual admission about American democratic quality
jokes.explanation: Sharp political satire with Selina casually admitting American democratic failures

jokes.text: When the committee called to tell me I would be receiving the Nobel Peace Prize-- Summit award-- I considered telling them I didn't want it.
jokes.setup: Selina's acceptance speech beginning
jokes.punchline: Immediate correction about what award she's actually receiving
jokes.explanation: Good callback to earlier Prize Junior joke, showing Selina still doesn't accept reality

jokes.text: Tibet's lamas, like these right here sitting in the front row, looking at me... would certainly be imprisoned and tortured in the most vicious ways imaginable... possibly even k-illed.
jokes.setup: Selina giving speech about Tibet freedom
jokes.punchline: Describing torture to actual Tibetan monks while knowing she just traded Tibet away
jokes.explanation: Peak cringe - describing oppression to monks whose freedom she just negotiated away moments earlier

jokes.text: You're fired. All right, let's get out of here. Take this piece of shit.
jokes.setup: Completing the disastrous speech
jokes.punchline: Immediately firing speechwriter and dismissing the award
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina deflection - blaming others and dismissing consequences immediately

jokes.text: Sorry you killed your own father and I wasn't there to see it! I can't! I can't believe you gave him chicken pox. I always had you pegged as an AIDS guy.
jokes.setup: Uncle Jeff at Lloyd's funeral
jokes.punchline: Laughing about Jonah killing his father and wrong disease prediction
jokes.explanation: Perfectly dark family dysfunction - uncle's inappropriate laughter and disease speculation

jokes.text: And I guess I don't even know if I liked him that much, because he probably woulda sucked like all of my other step-dads. And I don't care that he's dead, because I am very strong.
jokes.setup: Jonah giving eulogy for his father
jokes.punchline: Complete emotional detachment disguised as strength
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah emotional dysfunction - turning funeral into self-aggrandizing detachment

jokes.text: There's two things Americans don't like to see get hurt: animals, and white girls on spring break.
jokes.setup: Explaining why elephant death affects Selina's polling
jokes.punchline: Cynical political analysis of American priorities
jokes.explanation: Brilliant cynical political observation that perfectly captures American media priorities and racial bias

jokes.text: And when I say Lord, I mean Jesus Christ Almighty, not the Jewish one.
jokes.setup: Jonah thanking the Lord for getting through tough times
jokes.punchline: Casual antisemitic clarification
jokes.explanation: Character-consistent casual bigotry disguised as religious clarification

jokes.text: He had this carne asada that I think was a family recipe. That guy stays.
jokes.setup: Discussing immigration policy
jokes.punchline: Making exception based solely on good Mexican food
jokes.explanation: Perfect politician hypocrisy - immigration policy based on personal food preferences

jokes.text: Someday you'll be an old man, and you'll-- Governor, now that you're a super-delegate, have you given any thought as to who you're gonna be endorsing at the convention? Isn't there any way I can endorse all of them?
jokes.setup: Ben trying to give ominous warning to Richard
jokes.punchline: Interruption by reporter and Richard's people-pleasing response
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Richard's impossible desire to please everyone interrupting dramatic confrontation

jokes.text: Isn't there any way I can endorse all of them?
jokes.setup: Being asked who he'll endorse as a super-delegate
jokes.punchline: Richard's desire to avoid conflict by endorsing everyone
jokes.explanation: Perfect Richard moment - complete misunderstanding of political competition in favor of niceness

jokes.text: I haven't been funny since 1987.
jokes.setup: Someone saying Kent's comment isn't funny
jokes.punchline: Kent's precise acknowledgment of his humor deficit
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent moment - acknowledging his complete humorlessness with robotic precision and specific date

jokes.text: I just wanna be president. Do you want six almonds? No!
jokes.setup: Selina's emotional declaration about wanting presidency
jokes.punchline: Kent's tone-deaf offer of specific number of almonds
jokes.explanation: Perfect absurdist contrast between Selina's existential crisis and Kent's specific snack offer

tmdb_overview: Selina tries to arrange a meeting via her Finnish contact Minna. Gary helps Catherine plan a big event. Jonah and Amy push an anti-vax message in Pennsylvania. Mike finds a new home. Richard may have an enemy.
insight: Ninety jokes in forty-three minutes—Veep's densest finale run-up hits series peak velocity.
